info.name: Ticketing API
info.description:
REST API Collection untuk Ticketing System — CodeIgniter 3.

Semua endpoint membutuhkan Bearer Token di header Authorization.
Base URL menggunakan variable {{base_url}}.

request.description: Mengambil data komprehensif untuk dashboard.

item.name: Ticket
item.description:
Endpoint ticket — View only (GET).
Mendukung filter: date_start, date_end, department, feedback (all/ada/belum).
Detail ticket termasuk timeline, supporting, attachments, dan feedback.

request.description:
# List Tickets

Mengambil daftar tiket dengan **pagination** dan **filter opsional**.

---

## Authentication
| Header | Value |
| --- | --- |
| `Authorization` | `Bearer <token>` |

## Query Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Default | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | int | No | 1 | Nomor halaman |
| `per_page` | int | No | 10 | Jumlah item per halaman |
| `date_start` | string | No | - | Filter tanggal mulai (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `date_end` | string | No | - | Filter tanggal akhir (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `department` | string | No | - | Filter berdasarkan department |
| `feedback` | string | No | all | Filter feedback: `all` / `ada` / `belum` |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Data berhasil diambil",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "T202604030001",
            "date": "2026-04-03",
            "department": "IT",
            "category_id": "HW",
            "category_name": "Hardware",
            "description": "Lampu mati di Lantai 3",
            "priority": "1",
            "status": "1",
            "feedback_date": "2026-04-04 10:00:00",
            "feedback_result": "Sudah diperbaiki"
        }
    ],
    "meta": { "current_page": 1, "per_page": 10, "total": 7 }
}
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Token tidak valid atau tidak ada |

# Detail Ticket

Menampilkan **detail lengkap** sebuah tiket beserta:
- **Timeline** — Riwayat perjalanan tiket (data-driven dari `ticket_history` + `ticket_tracking`)
- **can_finish** / **finish_reason** — Flag untuk FE show/hide tombol Finish
- **Supporting** — Data pendukung dari feedback terbaru
- **Attachments** — File lampiran
- **Feedback** — Feedback terbaru

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket_id` | string | Yes | ID tiket, contoh: `T202604030001` |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": {
        "id": "T202604030001",
        "category_id": "HW",
        "category_name": "Hardware",
        "status": "1",
        "timeline": [
            { "tracking_id": 1, "label": "Dibuat", "timestamp": "2026-04-03 09:20:21", "is_done": true },
            { "tracking_id": 2, "label": "Diterima", "timestamp": null, "is_done": false },
            { "tracking_id": 3, "label": "Feedback", "timestamp": null, "is_done": false },
            { "tracking_id": 4, "label": "Finish", "timestamp": null, "is_done": false }
        ],
        "can_finish": false,
        "finish_reason": "Belum ada feedback",
        "supporting": null,
        "attachments": [],
        "feedback": { "id": null, "description": null, "date": null }
    }
}
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Tiket tidak ditemukan |

item.name: Ticket Category
item.description:
CRUD master kategori ticket.
Validasi create/update: description dan department wajib ada.

request.description:
# List Categories

Mengambil daftar **master kategori** tiket dengan pagination.

---

## Query Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Default | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | int | No | 1 | Nomor halaman |
| `per_page` | int | No | 10 | Jumlah per halaman |
| `department` | string | No | - | Filter by department |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": [ { "id": "PBL", "description": "Hardware", "department": "IT" } ],
    "meta": { "current_page": 1, "per_page": 10, "total": 3 }
}
```

# Detail Category

Mengambil **detail** satu kategori berdasarkan ID.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `category_id` | string | Yes | ID kategori (contoh: `PBL`) |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Kategori tidak ditemukan |

# Create Category

Membuat **kategori baru** untuk tiket.

---

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `description` | string | **Yes** | Nama kategori |
| `department` | string | **Yes** | Department pemilik |
| `date` | string | No | Tanggal (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `status` | string | No | Status kategori |

## Contoh Request Body
```json
{
    "description": "Hardware",
    "department": "IT",
    "date": "2026-04-07",
    "status": "active"
}
```

## Response Sukses (201 Created)
```json
{ "status": true, "message": "Kategori berhasil ditambahkan", "data": { "id": "HW" } }
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `422` | Validasi gagal (field wajib kosong) |

> **Catatan:** ID kategori baru otomatis tersimpan ke Postman variable `{{category_id}}`.

# Update Category

Memperbarui data **kategori** yang sudah ada.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `category_id` | string | Yes | ID kategori |

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `description` | string | **Yes** | Nama kategori |
| `department` | string | **Yes** | Department pemilik |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Kategori tidak ditemukan |
| `422` | Validasi gagal |

# Delete Category

**Soft delete** kategori — data tidak dihapus permanen, hanya mengisi kolom `deleted_at`.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `category_id` | string | Yes | ID kategori |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Kategori tidak ditemukan |

item.name: Ticket Feedback
item.description:
CRUD feedback + business logic.

POST menggunakan multipart/form-data karena mendukung upload file (opsional).
Saat POST create, akan:
1. INSERT ke ticket_feedback
2. Upload files[] ke ticket_attachment (jika ada)
3. UPDATE ticket.status → 'Feedback'
Semua dalam satu transaksi.

request.description:
# List Feedbacks

Mengambil daftar **semua feedback** tiket dengan pagination dan filter opsional.

---

## Query Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Default | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | int | No | 1 | Nomor halaman |
| `per_page` | int | No | 10 | Jumlah per halaman |
| `ticket_id` | string | No | - | Filter berdasarkan ticket_id |
| `department` | string | No | - | Filter berdasarkan department |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": [
        {
            "ticket_id": "T20260408FIN01",
            "description": "Sudah dicek dan kabel FO putus",
            "created_at": "2026-04-06 04:08:07",
            "created_byname": "Teknisi IT"
        }
    ],
    "meta": { "current_page": 1, "per_page": 10, "total": 5 }
}
```

# Detail Feedback

Mengambil **detail feedback** untuk satu tiket.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `feedback_id` | string | Yes | **Gunakan `ticket_id`** (contoh: `T20260408FIN01`). Tabel `ticket_feedback` memiliki relasi 1:1 dengan tiket. |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": {
        "ticket_id": "T20260408FIN01",
        "description": "Sudah dicek dan kabel FO putus, sudah disambung kembali.",
        "created_at": "2026-04-06 04:08:07",
        "created_byname": "Teknisi IT"
    }
}
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Feedback tidak ditemukan (tiket belum punya feedback) |

formdata.description: (Optional) File lampiran, bisa multiple. Max 10MB/file. Format: jpg/jpeg/png/pdf

request.description:
# Create Feedback (with file upload)

Submit **feedback baru** dari teknisi. Mendukung upload **multiple files** (`multipart/form-data`).

---

## Business Logic (Transaksional)
Dalam **satu transaksi DB**:
1. `INSERT` ke `ticket_feedback`
2. Upload file → `INSERT` ke `ticket_attachment` (jika ada)
3. Log event tracking "Feedback" via `TimelineService::logEvent()`
4. Auto-sync `ticket.status` → `3` (Feedback)

## Request Body (Form-Data)
| Field | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket_id` | string | **Yes** | ID tiket yang di-feedback |
| `department` | string | **Yes** | Nama department |
| `action` | string | **Yes** | Isi tindakan/feedback |
| `category_id` | string | No | Koreksi kategori tiket (bersumber dari master kategori) |
| `analysis` | string | No | Analisis teknis |
| `results` | string | No | Hasil pekerjaan |
| `status` | string | No | Status feedback |
| `date` | string | No | Tanggal feedback (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `location_id` | string | No | ID lokasi |
| `location_name` | string | No | Nama lokasi |
| `created_by` | string | No | User ID pembuat |
| `created_byname` | string | No | Nama pembuat |
| `files[]` | file | No | File lampiran (multi-file, max 10MB, format: jpg/jpeg/png/pdf) |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Feedback berhasil disimpan",
    "data": {
        "feedback": { "id": 1, "ticket_id": "T202604030001" },
        "uploaded_files": [],
        "ticket_category_updated_to": "HW"
    }
}
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `422` | Validasi gagal (field wajib kosong) |
| `500` | Gagal upload file / transaksi gagal |

> **Catatan:** Feedback ID otomatis tersimpan ke variable `{{feedback_id}}`.

> **Penting:** Setelah feedback dibuat, countdown 24 jam untuk tombol Finish dimulai.

# Update Feedback

Update data **feedback** yang sudah ada.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `feedback_id` | string | Yes | Gunakan `ticket_id` |

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `description` | string | No |
| `department` | string | No |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Feedback tidak ditemukan |

# Delete Feedback

**Soft delete** feedback.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `feedback_id` | string | Yes | Gunakan `ticket_id` |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Feedback tidak ditemukan |

request.description:
# List Priorities

Mengambil daftar **master prioritas** tiket dengan pagination.

| `per_page` | int | No | 10 | Jumlah per halaman |
| `department` | string | No | - | Filter by department |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json

```

# Detail Priority

Mengambil **detail** satu prioritas berdasarkan ID.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |

item.name: Ticket Status
item.description:
CRUD master status ticket.
getAll() menggunakan ORDER BY id ASC untuk keperluan step bar di FE.
Validasi create/update: description dan department wajib ada.

request.description:
# List Statuses

Mengambil daftar **master status** tiket. Digunakan FE untuk step bar / stepper.

---

## Query Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Default | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `page` | int | No | 1 | Nomor halaman |
| `per_page` | int | No | 10 | Jumlah per halaman |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": [
        { "status_id": "1", "status": "Open" },
        { "status_id": "2", "status": "Inprogress" },
        { "status_id": "3", "status": "Done" },
        { "status_id": "4", "status": "Cancel" }
    ]
}
```

> **Catatan:** `ticket_status` = STATE (kondisi saat ini). Untuk JOURNEY (riwayat), lihat `ticket_tracking`.

# Detail Status

Mengambil **detail** satu status berdasarkan `status_id`.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `status_id` | int | Yes | Status ID (PK) |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Status tidak ditemukan |

# Create Status

Membuat **status baru**.

---

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `description` | string | **Yes** | Nama status |
| `department` | string | **Yes** | Department |

> **Catatan:** ID status baru otomatis tersimpan ke variable `{{status_id}}`.

# Update Status

Memperbarui data **status** yang sudah ada.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `status_id` | int | Yes |

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `description` | string | **Yes** |
| `department` | string | **Yes** |

# Delete Status

**Soft delete** status.

---

## Path Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `status_id` | int | Yes |

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `404` | Status tidak ditemukan |

# List Master Step Tracking

Mengambil daftar **master data milestone** timeline tiket.

---

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": [
        { "id": "1", "name": "Dibuat", "description": "Ticket open" },
        { "id": "2", "name": "Diterima", "description": "Sudah dilihat dept ahli" },
        { "id": "3", "name": "Feedback", "description": "Sudah difeedback" },
        { "id": "4", "name": "Finish", "description": "Disubmit finish oleh user" },
        { "id": "5", "name": "Dibatalkan", "description": "Tiket dibatalkan" }
    ]
}
```

> **Catatan:** `ticket_tracking` = JOURNEY (milestone). Berbeda dengan `ticket_status` = STATE. Keduanya disinkronkan otomatis via `TimelineService::logEvent()`.

# Ticket History (Timeline per Ticket)

Mengambil **riwayat tracking step** untuk satu tiket, JOIN ke master `ticket_tracking`.

---

## Query Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket_id` | string | **Yes** | ID tiket (contoh: `T202604030001`) |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": [
        {
            "id": "1",
            "ticket_id": "T202604030001",
            "date": "2026-04-03 09:20:21",
            "tracking_id": "1",
            "tracking_name": "Dibuat",
            "description": "Ticket dibuat"
        }
    ]
}
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `422` | Parameter `ticket_id` tidak diisi |

# Log Event Manual (Transisi Timeline)

Mencatat **transisi milestone** tiket. Menggunakan `TimelineService::logEvent()` yang akan otomatis:
1. `INSERT` ke `ticket_history`
2. Auto-sync `ticket.status` sesuai correlation map

---

## Correlation Map
| tracking_id | Step | ticket.status |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Dibuat | 1 (Open) |
| 2 | Diterima | 1 (Open) |
| 3 | Feedback | 3 (Feedback) |
| 4 | Finish | 2 (Done) |
| 5 | Dibatalkan | 4 (Cancel) |

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket_id` | string | **Yes** | ID tiket |
| `tracking_id` | int | **Yes** | ID tracking step (1-5) |
| `description` | string | No | Catatan |
| `updateby` | string | No | Siapa yang melakukan |

## Contoh Request Body
```json
{
    "ticket_id": "T202604030002",
    "tracking_id": 2,
    "description": "Ticket diterima oleh departemen IT",
    "updateby": "U001 - Budi"
}
```

## Response Sukses (201 Created)
```json
{ "status": true, "message": "Event berhasil dicatat", "data": { "id": 4 } }
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `422` | Validasi gagal |
| `500` | Transaksi DB gagal |

# Check Finish Eligibility

Mengecek apakah tiket **eligible untuk di-finish**. FE gunakan untuk **show/hide tombol Finish**.

---

## Business Rules
Tiket bisa di-finish jika **SEMUA** kondisi terpenuhi:
1. `ticket.status` ≠ 2 (belum Done)
2. Sudah punya feedback di `ticket_feedback`
3. `feedback.created_at` sudah ≥ **24 jam** lalu
4. Belum pernah ada step "Finish" di `ticket_history`

## Query Parameters
| Parameter | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket_id` | string | **Yes** | ID tiket |

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "data": {
        "can_finish": false,
        "reason": "Belum mencapai 24 jam sejak feedback terakhir (baru 5.2 jam)",
        "feedback_at": "2026-04-06 04:08:07",
        "hours_since_feedback": 5.2
    }
}
```

## Kemungkinan Nilai `reason`
| reason | Penjelasan |
| --- | --- |
| `Ticket tidak ditemukan` | ticket_id tidak valid |
| `Ticket sudah selesai (Done)` | Status sudah = 2 |
| `Ticket sudah pernah di-finish` | Ada step Finish di history |
| `Belum ada feedback` | Belum ada data di ticket_feedback |
| `Belum mencapai 24 jam...` | Jeda waktu belum cukup |
| `Eligible — feedback telah melebihi 1x24 jam` | ✅ Boleh finish |

# Manual Finish (Tombol Selesai)

Dipanggil ketika **user menekan tombol Finish** di UI.

---

## Business Logic
1. Validasi eligibility (aturan 24 jam)
2. Jika eligible → `logEvent(tracking_id=4)` → auto-sync `ticket.status = 2 (Done)`
3. Jika tidak eligible → return error 422

## Request Body (JSON)
| Field | Tipe | Required | Keterangan |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ticket_id` | string | **Yes** | ID tiket |
| `updateby` | string | No | Siapa yang memfinish |

## Contoh Request Body
```json
{
    "ticket_id": "T20260408FIN01",
    "updateby": "U001 - Budi"
}
```

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Ticket berhasil di-finish",
    "data": {
        "ticket_id": "T20260408FIN01",
        "history_id": 10,
        "finished_at": "2026-04-08 11:00:00",
        "status_synced_to": 2
    }
}
```

## Response Error
| Code | Keterangan |
| --- | --- |
| `422` | Tidak eligible (reason: `Belum mencapai 24 jam...` / `Belum ada feedback` / `Ticket sudah pernah di-finish`) |

# Auto-Finish Scheduler (Cron Job)

Endpoint untuk dipanggil oleh **CRON** secara berkala (rekomendasi: setiap 1 jam).

---

## Business Logic
1. Scan SEMUA tiket dengan `status = 3` (Feedback)
2. Filter: `feedback.created_at` ≥ 24 jam & belum pernah Finish
3. Loop per tiket → `finishTicket()` → auto-sync status ke Done

## Contoh Crontab
```bash
0 * * * * curl -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer <token>" http://localhost/api/ticket-scheduler/auto-finish
```

## Response Sukses (200 OK)
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "3 ticket berhasil di-auto-finish",
    "data": {
        "finished_count": 3,
        "ticket_ids": ["T20260408FIN01", "T20260408FIN02", "T20260408FIN03"],
        "errors": []
    }
}
```

## Response saat Tidak Ada yang Eligible
```json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Tidak ada ticket yang perlu di-finish",
    "data": { "finished_count": 0, "ticket_ids": [], "errors": [] }
}
```
